thoughts: Watches over the new litter
Is brimming with love
Is thinking of {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} new responsibilities
Is in awe of how fast {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} family has grown
Is taken aback by the intensity of {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} love
Can't think of anything cuter than {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} new kits
Looks forward to every little moment to come
Can barely stand to be separate from the new litter
Is fascinated by how small {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} new kitten's paws are
Gushes over every noise {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} kit is making
Enjoys some very special family moments
Remembers what a full night of sleep used to feel like
Realizes how much work kits can be
Needs a moment away from the new litter
Can't believe the new litter is finally here
Grooms the new litter
Hasn't stopped purring since the litter arrived
Hasn't left the nursery since the litter arrived
Won't let anyone look at the new litter just yet
Wants to show every cat the new litter
Is still indecisive on names
Fondly remembers sleeping through the night
Hopes the new litter's crying isn't keeping everyone up
Has never been so exhausted in all {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} life
Asks r_c to watch over the kits
Stops r_c from falling out of the nest
Makes sure r_c has fed enough
Hissed at a Clanmate who got too close to r_c
Considers renaming r_c
Is proud of r_c for sleeping through the night
